name_en: YSL Crocodile Grain Card Holder in stock, ordered for HK$3100. A super practical piece. Small but very spacious, it holds large bills and coins can be placed in the zip pocket! The most thoughtful feature is the ID card slot that is visible. In short, a must-have super practical item for everyone. Calfskin + Sheepskin. Full set of counter packaging.
